gateway-request-validation.description: Run gateway request and parameter validation tests.

gateway-symbol-routes.description: Run gateway routing and JSON decoding tests with stub cores.

gateway-execution.description: Run gateway execution tests against the synced native extension.

gateway-trace-payloads.description: Run trace payload validation and replay-shape tests.

gateway-management-routes.description: Run gateway virtual-file and symbol-index routing tests with stub cores.

gateway-runtime.description: Run gateway runtime and transport tests against the synced native extension.

gateway-fast.description: Run the pure-Python gateway protocol suites that do not require syncing the native extension.

gateway-native.description: Run the gateway suites that execute against the synced native extension.
